market_pulse: LIV Beach leads momentum with Nathan April (Fri 4/24) + David Guetta (Sat 4/25); competitors ramping EDC Week prep with marquee talent at Zouk (RL Grime 5/8, Lil Wayne 5/9), TAO Beach (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki May 14-17), and Hakkasan (R&Bae Wednesdays driving consistent weeknight traffic).

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily promoting EDC Week May 2026 with early-bird DJ announcements and TikTok hype videos; LIV's May calendar visibility lower than peers.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch May EDC Week pre-sale campaign on Instagram/TikTok with top 3 DJ headliners by late April; use influencer takeovers (@globeth0tter, Vegas promoters) for guest list teasers.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan dominates Wed/Thu with R&Bae Wednesdays recurring series; LIV's weeknight calendar less visible on social.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 'Thirsty Thursdays' or weekday residency campaign; repurpose TikTok clips from weeknight events to build mid-week audience habit.

content_gaps.description: TAO Beach, Palm Tree Beach Club, and Encore Beach Club posting high-engagement pool/cabana lifestyle content; LIV Beach lacks behind-the-scenes cabana setup posts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post weekly LIV Beach cabana/pool setup videos on Reels/Shorts; include guest testimonials and VIP package callouts.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest-list attendee; high engagement (591 likes, 61 comments) with Tiësto mention.
Frequently posts OMNIA, Hakkasan, and Zouk Nightclub content; 2M+ likes on Hakkasan 'satisfaction' video; strong Vegas club authority.
Promoted LIV Beach grand opening with VIP host/promoter angle; targeted bottle service and all-inclusive party packages.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: High engagement on LIV Nightclub review; micro-influencer with Vegas credibility
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Send guest list offer for upcoming Fri/Sat events; request 2-3 follow-up posts

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Massive reach (2M+ engagements) covering nightlife; creates consistent club content
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Partner for LIV/LIV Beach takeover series during EDC Week; offer exclusive behind-the-scenes access
